eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Park, CO; at 11:53 AM on JUN 24, 2026 Effective until 2:53 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: June 24, 2026 12:42 . This is an evacuation notification from Park County Sheriffs Office to advise residents and campers in the area of Bruno Gulch Campground on County Road 62 that there is a Wildfire. This is a full evacuation. Evacuations are mandatory and entry to evacuated areas may be denied. For further information go to  https://tinyurl.com/39yea2pn or call 719.836.4200.
